title: Anvilcraft:Alloy Extension
description: Anvilcraft's subsidiary mods add more alloys, weapons, tools, food, and more convenient recipes to help you play Anvilcraft better.
body:
**Important Notice**
This mod need AnvilCraft mod as dependency.
If the game crashes after installing this mod, please update your Neoforge version. We recommend using at least version 21.1.193.

**_Items&Enchantments_**
**Items：**
Aluminum Ore and Aluminum Item Frames (including Glowing, Redstone, Amethyst, and Ender variants).
New tools crafted from Rose Gold, Purple Gold, and Electrum, each granting special enchantments.
Steel used to upgrade unique tools-steel bow and steel shield!
And a detailed instruction book!

**Enchantments：**
10 brand-new enchantments including:
Ore Finder (reveals nearby ores)
Experience Absorption (draws XP from broken blocks)
Health Absorption (restores health when attacking)
Long Reach (extends attack range)
(plus 6 others!)
 

重要提示
本模组需铁砧工艺模组作为前置。
如果安装该模组后崩溃，请更新Neoforge版本，个人推荐至少21.1.193。

物品与附魔

物品：
铝矿石 & 铝质物品展示框（含发光、红石、紫水晶及末影变种）
新增玫瑰金、紫金、琥珀金工具（自带特殊附魔）
钢锭可以升级独特的工具——钢弓与钢盾！
以及一本详细的介绍书！
附魔
10种全新附魔！其中包括但不限于：
矿石探索者 —— 探测周围矿石
经验汲取 —— 从破坏方块中获取经验
生命汲取 —— 攻击时恢复生命值
修长之触 —— 增加攻击距离
